zh.lifeSummary: 當Sr Thomas Hinton於1510年12月出生在英國英格蘭波克夏時，他的父親John Hinton22歲，母親Joan Francklyn22歲。他於1531年與Anne Goddard在英國維爾爾阿爾德布恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年12月25日在英國英格蘭維爾爾望別洛享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾望別洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sr Thomas Hinton于1510年12月出生在英国英格兰波克夏时，他的父亲John Hinton22岁，母亲Joan Francklyn22岁。他于1531年与Anne Goddard在英国維爾爾阿爾德布恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年12月25日在英国英格兰維爾爾望別洛享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾望別洛。

nameMeanings.name: Hinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Hinton (for example, in Shropshire, Herefordshire, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Hampshire, and Northamptonshire). Some of the placenames, such as those in Northamptonshire, Shropshire, and Herefordshire, derive from Old English hīna, genitive plural form of hīwan ‘household, religious community’, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’ (compare Hine as the first element). Others, such as those in Gloucestershire, Somerset, and Hampshire, derive from Old English hēan, dative form of hēah ‘high’ + tūn.

variants.name: Hine
meanings: English (Devon): occupational name from Middle English, Old English hīne ‘servant, member of a household’, also ‘farm laborer’ (such as a herdsman or shepherd). Originally a collective term for a body of servants, from an Old English plural noun, hīwan ‘household’, in early modern English it commonly acquired excrescent -d (see Hinde ). Evidence from Nottinghamshire shows that some bearers of the name were wealthy freemen, which suggests that their eponymous ancestors were not farmhands but senior members of a lord's household. From the late 15th century onward in western England, from south to north, a hine or hind also denoted a farm steward or manager, a sense that may be relevant to the surname in northwestern England, where hereditary naming had not been fully established by the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sr Thomas Hinton was born in December 1510, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hinton, was 22 and his mother, Joan Francklyn, was 22. He married Anne Goddard in 1531, in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 25 December 1568, in Wanborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Wanborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sr Thomas Hinton est né en décembre 1510, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hinton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Francklyn, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Anne Goddard en 1531, à Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1568, à Wanborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Wanborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sr Thomas Hinton im Dezember 1510 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hinton 22 und seine Mutter Joan Francklyn 22. Er hat 1531 in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England Anne Goddard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1568 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Wanborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wanborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sr Thomas Hinton è nato il nel dicembre 1510 nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Hinton, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Francklyn, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Anne Goddard nel 1531, nel Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1568, nel Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sr Thomas Hintonが1510年12月にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Hintonは22歳，母Joan Francklynは22歳であった。1531年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアアルドボウルンでAnne Goddardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年12月25日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアワンボロウで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアワンボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sr Thomas Hinton(이)가 1510년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hinton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Francklyn(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1531년 영국 윌츠히르 알드보우른에서 Anne Goddard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 완버루에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 완버루에 묻혔다.

pt.1510: de 11 de janeiro de 1510 a 10 de janeiro de 1511
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sr Thomas Hinton nasceu em dezembro de 1510, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hinton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Francklyn, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Goddard em 1531, em Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1568, em Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sr Thomas Hinton родился декабрь 1510 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hinton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Francklyn, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Goddard в 1531 г. в местности алдбурн, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер 25 декабря 1568 г. в местности ванбороую, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ванбороую, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Anne Goddard en 1531, en Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1568, en Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
